_comment: GlassBox MCP server configuration for Claude Desktop.
1. Copy this file's contents into your Claude Desktop config:
2. Replace the two placeholder values below:
PROJECT_ROOT       — absolute path to this project folder
'Use the GlassBox AutoFit tool with csv_path="titanic_dataset.csv"
Claude Desktop launches run_server.py as a subprocess when it starts.
The script speaks the MCP protocol over stdin/stdout.
Claude discovers the AutoFit tool automatically and can call it
whenever a user asks to build or train a model.
